message:
fix(og): await params Promise in dynamic OG images (Next.js 15+ compat)

In Next.js 15+, dynamic route params are wrapped in a Promise and must
be awaited before accessing their properties. The dynamic OG images for
lessons and tools were directly accessing params.slug and params.tool
without awaiting, causing 500 errors at runtime on Vercel.

Files fixed:
- apps/web/app/learn/[slug]/opengraph-image.tsx
- apps/web/app/learn/[slug]/twitter-image.tsx
- apps/web/app/learn/tools/[tool]/opengraph-image.tsx
- apps/web/app/learn/tools/[tool]/twitter-image.tsx

Change: { params: { slug: string } } -> { params: Promise<{ slug: string }> }
        params.slug -> const { slug } = await params; slug

This matches the pattern already used in the corresponding page.tsx files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
